text: Excuse me sir, sir, question for you. Huh? I have a question for you. Sure. How did you become wealthy? How did I become wealthy? Yes sir. Banking. And baking. Investment banking. Where are you from? originally from Nigeria by graphic. In London. Yeah, I went to school in England. So what was the most amount of money that you made in a single year? I think 30 million. 30 million dollars? Yes. That's why I can dress like this on a weekday. So what is a lesson about money that banks don't want people to know? Every pound you deposit in the bank, the bank lends it nine times. Wow. That's a bank multiplier. Hey, hey, they don't teach you that in school. They don't teach you that in school. And I did an MBA. No one told me that the power of wealth is about leverage. Did you ever leverage money? Of course. Yeah, that's the only way to make money. All this property is here. It's someone's leverage. Everything you see around here. This restaurant. Someone's bought 100,000 years, borrowed 900 grand. It's leverage. So what's this? Even this car. It's leverage. Did you come from a rich family? Ah, relatively. Not rich, but my father's a doctor. But you chose not to be a spoiled rich kid. Yeah, he worked hard for it. Why didn't you want to be a doctor like your dad? Ah, two of my brothers ended up in medicine. So you're kind of the black sheep of the family? Totally. We all have different parts in life. What's more important in the business world today? What you know or who you know? I think what you know now. What you know. Yeah, voting the party was who you know. Because if you think about it, one of the governors of the Bank of England was complaining that his daughter doesn't have a job. That wouldn't happen 20 years ago. Because nepotism, that person would have got a job. But now, a lot of people can make connections. But if you've got nothing of substance behind you, those connections are worthless. How old are you? I'm old, you know. I'm around 58. 58 years old? Yeah. If me and you died tomorrow and you had one more message to leave with the younger generation, what would that be? The US has only been around for 300 years. And look at what they've achieved. When the queen died, the queen had been alive for a third of the existence of the US. So, get out there. The world is big. Compounding helps you. Whatever you do now, whatever investment you make now, your children are never ever going to say you made a bad investment. Can I tell you something, sir? Sure. You have incredible advice. Well, we try. And every week I host live calls with the millionaires and billionaires I interview. Would you do a live call, mentors and people? Sure, you give me your card or...? I'll give you my contact. Okay, yeah. Guys, if you want access to the live call, comment billionaire below and I'll send it to you.
